title: lastrea ascendens
intro: Lastrea ascendens, also known as the Asian maiden's hair fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lastrea ascendens include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Lastrea ascendens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, tonics, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
